description: Exhaustive Enabot-depth product corpus for Hardware-Splicer capability sweeps. Covers the junk→intent addressable space: multi-subsystem DIY cousins of real consumer machines (not a fixed N cap).

depth_definition.enabot_class: MCU + power + at least one of sense/actuate/drive/comms; salvage-plausible; commercial analog exists or is obvious.

products.goal: DIY Enabot-like rolling home camera robot: dual-wheel drive, Wi-Fi camera, battery, obstacle sense
